Ruto's apologist & approved protester! No bozo; Ruto is in office because you were paid to sabotage GenZs. We have all the proof to put you away for life. Such an empty skull: what you have stumbled upon (without knowing it) is a regular tactic in Electoral Fraud. Before rigging, the perpetrators arrange for plausible "explanations," which they throw in the air for Bozos like you to swallow. It was done in 1992 ("Opposition disunity") and every election since except 2007 & 2017. Nyanza undervoting: voters were transferred from Nyanza and Western to Central. The majority went to Kiambu, Murang'a etc. Voters turned up to vote and were kicked out as having already voted. Chebukati voted for them! Ruto now fully controls those votes, and he will vote in Governors, Senators, even MCAs while you play your games on the streets and go banking in Switzerland and to ride expensive motorbikes. Stop taking people in Kenya for a rough ride. Go eat your loot from Ruto in peace.
